# Badger Grapple Red Engine v2.5

## Improved
- Overworld HUD now shows lead wrestler, HP/gas, Grit, Rep, Invites, and tile-specific action prompts.
- Interactive tiles show an A marker.
- Scout report now explains challenge choice, style, rarity, invite count, and expected recruit odds.
- Menu now gives feedback after training, using energy, buying items, saving, and reset-demo confirmation.
- Battle scene has a clearer match log, HP deltas, score, rewards, outcome prompts, and build marker.
- B is disabled during live battles; it only returns after the match is complete.
- Deployed index imports `./src_v2_5/main.js?v=25`.

## Verify
The note under the game should say:
`Engine v2.5 feedback pass. Better HUD, battle log, scout report, menu feedback, reset option.`
